title: Dark Mode by AB
body:
## ☀️ Tired of blindingly bright interfaces? 🌙 **Embrace the dark side!** **Designed for visual comfort during your epic nighttime and daytime adventures alike!** _**A Simple Change. A Revolutionary Experience.**_ ![Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68b2bbc672b6de9980cee5f151c916fea11c4806.jpeg) Captured with [Panorama](https://modrinth.com/mod/swd-panorama) and [Complementary Shaders - Unbound](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound) _**No matter how the inventory looks. It always seems Amazing.** Probably..._ ![Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d33771067b1da36f3c19be6ded9b7ba337db0896_0.webp) _Seriously, my inventory always looks like this._ (Optional)
**↓To activate this feature↓ install: [Puzzle](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzle) Or [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads)** ![Dark Mojang Studio](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3452f0bc9be7faabf04a8b1c85de3b9aa7ca5db6.png) ## 🎯 How to Install ↑ > ### 🛠️ Step 1 – Install the Modrinth App > > **Install the [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app).**
> Then click the **“Select Account”** button in the **top-right corner** and log in with the **Microsoft account** linked to your copy of **Minecraft**. > > --- > > ### 🖥️ Step 2 – Create or Configure a Minecraft Instance > > **Create a new Minecraft instance** using the **“+”** button on the **left panel**.
> Then choose a loader such as **Fabric**, **Quilt**, or **NeoForge**, and select your **Minecraft version**. > > **⚙️ If the instance already exists**, click on it and then click the **gear icon**.
> Go to **“Installation”** and select one of the available loaders: **Fabric**, **Quilt**, or **NeoForge**. > > --- > > ### 📦 Step 3 – Add the Required Mod > > Go to **“Discover Content”** (the **compass icon**), then navigate to the **“Mods”** category.
> Search for **[Puzzle](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzle)** and **install it** in the instance you created. > > --- > > ### 🎨 Step 4 – Download the Resource Pack > > If you're using the **Modrinth App**, go to the **“Resource Packs”** category, > search for **Dark Mode by AB**, and click the **Download** button. > > --- > > ### ▶️ Step 5 – Launch Minecraft > > Click on your **instance** in the **left panel**, then press the **“▶ Play”** button to **launch Minecraft from Modrinth**. > > --- > > ### 🧩 Step 6 – Activate the Resource Pack in Minecraft > > In **Minecraft**, go to **Options → Resource Packs** and activate the **resource pack**. > > --- > > 🌙 *Now you can enjoy **Minecraft** with a stylish and comfortable **dark interface**.*
> 💜 **Thank you for choosing Dark Mode by AB!** ## 📦 Supported Mods |Mod|‎1.21‎|‎1.21.1‎|‎1.21.2‎|‎1.21.3‎|‎1.21.4‎|‎1.21.5‎|1.21.6|1.21.7|1.21.8|1.21.9|1.21.10|1.21.11|26.1|26.1.1|
